tests.description: One grant covers the shared guard for all branches (dedupe): total spend of branches + after1 (0.000008) fits the single 0.0000085 grant, after2 (0.00001) trips and is rejected by the spent-based handler. If each branch had been granted separately, the limit would exceed 0.000018 and after2 would fit — reaching the BUG output.
A race loser with in-flight spend under the guard neither hangs the race nor resurfaces after the winner returns.
